ai_dock.title: Ask AI
ai_dock.subtitle: Ask about this page, this chart, or the current timing layer.
ai_dock.placeholder: Ask about the current dasha, D1 promise, KP/BCC, transits, divisional charts, compatibility...
ai_dock.not_configured: No model selected yet. Open AI Settings and save one.
ai_dock.settings_alert_suffix: Go to AI Interpretations to configure it.

login.title: Login - Vedic Astro
login.heading: Protected Access
login.intro: This app contains private stored charts and readings. Sign in with your own account to access only your saved birth data and readings.
login.session_hint: Session stays active in this browser until you log out.
login.firebase_enabled: Firebase auth is enabled for this deployment.
login.email_section: Or sign in with email and password
login.firebase_not_configured: Firebase auth is not configured for this deployment yet.

life_map.title: Life Map Reading
life_map.description: A structured Vedic astrology life map combining D1, KP/Bhava Chalit, current dasha, Jaimini indicators, strengths, tensions, and practical guidance.

checkout.heading: Life Map Reading
checkout.intro: Buy a structured Vedic astrology life map for the selected birth profile. Checkout uses the server-side launch campaign price.
checkout.success: Stripe returned successfully. If payment is confirmed, the order will show as paid.
checkout.cancelled: Checkout was cancelled. You can start a new checkout when ready.
checkout.missing_order: The returned order could not be found for this account.
checkout.generate_blocked: Generation is blocked until Stripe confirms payment.
checkout.generated: Reading generated and stored. PDF export is coming next.
